projectDescription: An in-game BepInEx mod manager for Among Us that lets players install, enable, disable, and share DLL plugins without manually moving files.
keyFeatures: In-game mod manager accessible via F7 hotkey
Install DLL mods through a native Windows file picker
Enable and disable mods individually or by group without restarting
Shared room-code pack downloads so hosts can distribute mod sets to players
Signed manifest verification with RSA/SHA-256 for secure pack distribution
VSK skin support for customizing the launcher UI appearance
Automatic state snapshots tracking active, disabled, and queued mods
Automatic backup of overwritten DLLs before installation
publicApiSurface: ModFileService.GetMods() — returns all installed and disabled mod entries
ModFileService.GetStagedMods() — returns queued mods waiting to be installed
ModFileService.StageDll(sourcePath) — copies a DLL into the import queue
ModFileService.InstallStagedMod(sourcePath) — moves a queued DLL into the plugins folder
ModFileService.InstallStagedGroup(groupKey) — installs all DLLs in a queued folder
ModFileService.Enable(fullPath) / Disable(fullPath) — toggle a single mod
ModFileService.EnableGroup(groupKey) / DisableGroup(groupKey) — toggle an entire mod folder
ModFileService.DeleteDisabled(fullPath) — permanently remove a disabled DLL
SupabasePackService.DownloadPackAsync(roomCode, modFileService) — fetch and queue a shared mod pack by room code
InstallPlanner.CreatePlan(amongUsDirectory, manifest, installedManifestIds) — compute an install plan with dependency and conflict checks
GameProcessService.PickDllAndStage(modFileService) — open native file dialog and stage selected DLL
GameProcessService.CloseAmongUs() — gracefully quit the game via Unity Application.Quit()
